review_text: Definitivamente ya sé por qué tienen una calificación de 4.9 en Degusta. Como amante de los sabores y aromas mediterráneos, creo que encontré mi lugar favorito en la ciudad. ¿Qué les puedo decir? Para mí, es de lo mejor que he probado. La propuesta destaca por una comida impecable, fresca y bien elaborada. Logran un equilibrio perfecto en mesa con platos cremosos, contrastes crujientes, el uso respetuoso de las especias y carnes sumamente jugosas en su punto óptimo. Lo más valioso de su cocina es que esos aromas y sabores me hicieron recordar inmediatamente mi niñez en casa de la griega María, la amiga de mi mamá, cuando íbamos a su casa a comer. Es alta cocina con el alma de la cocina casera tradicional. La atención está al nivel que esperaba el joven que nos atendió demostró un gran manejo de la carta, estuvo siempre dispuesto a explicar, sugerir y, sobre todo, pendiente de nuestra mesa con una sincronización impecable. El local es muy cómodo, acogedor y destaca por su limpieza absoluta. El único punto de mejora logística propio de la zona son los estacionamientos, que se perciben un poco reducidos en horas pico, pero la experiencia gastronómica compensa por completo este detalle. Un lugar de visita obligatoria para los que buscan consistencia y frescura. Definitivamente tengo que regresar.

review_text: Sin duda, el mejor sushi bar de Panamá. Fácilmente se ha posicionado como uno de mis restaurantes favoritos. Más allá de los clásicos, recomiendo probar la mayor cantidad de opciones posibles del menú, ya que cada plato tiene una personalidad propia y sabores distintivos que sorprenden. Es de esos lugares donde cada visita se convierte en una nueva experiencia gastronómica. Si eres amante del sushi y la cocina japonesa de calidad, este lugar es una visita obligada.

review_text: Salsipuedes Restaurant After a long humid day in the forest we just walked by this hotel and said screw it. The location and set up is gorgeous, their servers are well trained and polite! Just a side note they charge you for the water they put on your table. Found that quite odd The bartender knows exactly what hes doing, every cocktail we tried was delicious and perfectly balanced. The chefs menu looks fantastic with lots of variety and colours. Excited to dive in. We got complimentary plantain chips and warm Panamanian bread to start! Delicious appetizer 8.810 Ordered the Salmon Ceviche 9.210 colourful, acidic, fatty, crunch, soft. It was hitting every note and overall fantastic dish. I got the curry Afrocaribeño 6.210. The coconut rice was seasoned to perfection, not too sweet and perfectly cooked. Presented in a big banana leaf to show tradition great touch. Overall flavour was pretty good but there was some technical flaws. The eggplant definitely wasnt soaked in salt water for preparation as it was quite bitter. Also there was just half a piece of Brussels sprout and half a piece of asparagus? I dont know if I just got a bad portion but that shouldnt happen. It was mainly zucchini and egg plant. The chicken was also quite dry which was disappointing. Causa y Camarones 7.510. Gorgeous plating and a cold dish. Shrimps were cooked beautifully and all the flavours were delicate. The flavours overall werent wowing and personally I think it could have used some spice. Also sauce to dish ratio was too much. Food 4 Service 4 Atmosphere 4 Meal type Lunch Price per person PAB 4550

restaurant_name: Restaurante Santa Rita  Comida Española Panamá
review_text: Fuimos a cenar en Santa Rita en nuestra última noche en Panamá y fue, sin exagerar, uno de los mejores momentos del viaje. El lugar es hermoso, con un ambiente cálido y elegante que invita a relajarse y disfrutar. Pero lo que realmente marca la diferencia es la atención impecable, cercana y genuina. Incluso la dueña, argentina, se acercó a saludarnos, y ese gesto hizo que la experiencia se sintiera todavía más especial y personalizada. Decidimos compartir varias entradas y platos, y cada uno superó al anterior. Los buñuelos de bacalao estaban increíbles, el portobello lleno de sabor y la tortilla de papas con trufa directamente espectacular. De principales, el salmón con papas y la pesca del día con risotto de hongos fueron de un nivel altísimo, con productos de calidad y una ejecución impecable. Se nota cuando hay pasión detrás de un proyecto, y Santa Rita lo transmite en cada detalle en la comida, en el servicio y en el ambiente. Es de esos lugares que no solo recomendás, sino que realmente querés que otros descubran. Sin duda volveríamos. Gracias por una noche inolvidable. Food 5 Service 5 Atmosphere 5 Price per person PAB 4045

review_text: Kaandela Restaurant is an absolute gem in historic downtown Panama! Located in the heart of the city just minutes from the cathedral, the restaurant is surrounded by stunning architecture and breathtaking views that create an unforgettable atmosphere. A special thank you to Luis Afu, the restaurant manager, who provided extensive and thoughtful details about food preparation and perfect wine pairing options. His knowledge and passion truly elevated the entire dining experience. The staff is fantastic  welcoming, attentive, and incredibly knowledgeable. You can genuinely feel their passion for hospitality from the moment you arrive. Chef Jose Aparicio even came out, and we had the opportunity to meet and personally thank him. He is such a young and talented chef with a true passion for the art of cooking. From the rich flavors to the beautiful plating, every dish is presented like art and tastes just as incredible. I cant emphasize enough how delicious the meal was. I will definitely be back to continue experiencing the food, culture, and vibrant energy this place brings. Highly recommend! P.S. If youre lucky, you may even be able to book a stay in this exclusive location  which makes the experience even more special. Meal type Dinner Price per person PAB 50 Food 5 Service 5 Atmosphere 5

restaurant_name: Aya la Vida Restaurante Comida Panameña Panamá
review_text: What a great experience Aya la Vida was! We came on the recommendation of friends and were so glad we did! The restaurant was spacious with many different sized tables for groups of every size. They had live music the night we went, which was such a fun experience to be a part of. The food was delicious  traditional Panamanian. Dont be turned off or confused by some of the dish names  they did literal translations for a few. We got the Volcano Old Clothes Meat  in Spanish its Ropa Vieja  which is a traditional slow cooked beef. Drinks were good, too, and all was reasonably priced. Id recommend a reservation, especially if youre more than 4. Meal type Dinner Price per person PAB 4045 Food 5 Service 5 Atmosphere 5

restaurant_name: Aya la Vida Restaurante Comida Panameña Panamá
review_text: We went to Aya La Vida as a group of four and from start to finish it was simply outstanding. We ordered three appetizers, three main dishes, and three desserts  and every single plate was excellent. Not one weak point. Everything we tried was full of flavor, beautifully presented, and clearly made with pride. But what made the entire experience next level was our server, Sonny. Sonny was absolutely amazing. Friendly, happy, professional, and incredibly efficient. Every dish we ordered was his recommendation  and he nailed every single one. That kind of confidence and knowledge only comes from someone who truly understands and believes in what theyre serving. He prepared the steak tartare right at the table, explaining everything and engaging with all of us. Then he came back for dessert and did the rum flambé tableside  fire, presentation, energy  the whole experience. Its that extra effort, that extra pride in service, that makes you genuinely happy to leave a 2030 tip without even thinking about it. When you find a place with great food and service that is genuinely warm and kind, it changes the entire night. You can feel that the manager, the kitchen, and the ownership are doing something special. They are showcasing quality Panamanian cuisine in a way that makes both locals and tourists proud. Live music, dancing on Thursdays, great vibe, amazing hospitality  this place has it all. Huge congratulations to the team at Aya La Vida, and especially to Sonny. Well definitely be back. Meal type Dinner Price per person PAB 3035 Food 5 Service 5 Atmosphere 5
